Package org.apache.juneau.marshall.cbor

package org.apache.juneau.marshall.cbor
CBOR (Concise Binary Object Representation) marshalling support per RFC 8949.

CBOR is a binary data format designed for extremely small code size, very small message size, and extensibility. It is widely used in IoT, constrained environments, COSE (CBOR Object Signing and Encryption), and WebAuthn.

CBOR shares the same data model as JSON: maps, arrays, strings, numbers, booleans, and null. The CborSerializer and CborParser provide binary encoding/decoding with compact integer representation and native byte strings.

Type mapping:

  • Java beans / Map → CBOR map (major type 5)
  • Collection / array → CBOR array (major type 4)
  • String / Enum → CBOR text string (major type 3)
  • Integer types → CBOR unsigned/negative integer (major types 0/1)
  • Float / Double → CBOR IEEE 754 float (major type 7)
  • Boolean → CBOR simple values 20/21
  • null → CBOR simple value 22
  • byte[] → CBOR byte string (major type 2)
See Also:
  • CBOR Basics
  • RFC 8949
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.apache.juneau.marshall
    Marshalling API
  • Class
    Description
    Cbor
    Annotation that can be applied to classes, fields, and methods to tweak how they are handled by CborSerializer and CborParser.
    CborAnnotation
    Utility classes and methods for the @Cbor annotation.
    CborAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    CborApply
    Dynamically applies a @Cbor annotation to specified classes, methods, or fields.
    CborApply.Array
    A collection of @CborApply annotations.
    CborApplyAnnotation
    Utility classes and methods for the @CborApply annotation.
    CborApplyAnnotation.Applier
    Applies targeted CborApply annotations to a Context.Builder.
    CborApplyAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    CborBeanPropertyMeta
    Metadata on bean properties specific to the CBOR serializers and parsers pulled from the @Cbor annotation on the bean property.
    CborClassMeta
    Metadata on classes specific to the CBOR serializers and parsers pulled from the @Cbor annotation on the class.
    CborConfig
    Annotation for specifying config properties defined in CborSerializer and CborParser.
    CborConfigAnnotation
    Utility classes and methods for the @CborConfig annotation.
    CborConfigAnnotation.ParserApply
    Applies CborConfig annotations to a CborParser.Builder.
    CborConfigAnnotation.SerializerApply
    Applies CborConfig annotations to a CborSerializer.Builder.
    CborInputStream
    Specialized input stream for parsing CBOR streams (RFC 8949).
    CborMetaProvider
    Interface for providing access to CborClassMeta and CborBeanPropertyMeta objects.
    CborOutputStream
    Specialized output stream for serializing CBOR streams (RFC 8949).
    CborParser
    Parses CBOR streams (RFC 8949) into POJO models.
    CborParser.Base64
    Default parser, string input encoded as BASE64.
    CborParser.Builder
    Builder class.
    CborParser.SpacedHex
    Default parser, string input encoded as spaced-hex.
    CborParserSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of CborParser.
    CborParserSession.Builder
    Builder class.
    CborSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to CBOR (RFC 8949).
    CborSerializer.Base64
    Default serializer, BASE64 string output.
    CborSerializer.Builder
    Builder class.
    CborSerializer.SpacedHex
    Default serializer, spaced-hex string output.
    CborSerializerSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of CborSerializer.
    CborSerializerSession.Builder
    Builder class.
    CborTokenReader
    Reference implementation of the public TokenReader surface for the CBOR format (RFC 8949).
    CborTokenWriter
    Reference implementation of the public TokenWriter surface for the CBOR format (RFC 8949).
    CborTokenWriter.Settings
    Cursor-level settings honored by CborTokenWriter.
